description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a monkey, featuring a soft, brown body with a lighter cream-colored face and inner ears. The toy has two outstretched arms and two legs, all proportionally thick and rounded, giving it a cuddly appearance. Its face is simple, with minimal detailing, and the ears are large and rounded, protruding from the sides of the head. The back view reveals a small, thin tail extending from the lower back. The surface texture appears fuzzy and matte, typical of soft fabric toys. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or brand markings on the toy.
description: A soft, brown plush monkey toy with a cream-colored face, large ears, and a small tail. Its limbs are outstretched and the surface is fuzzy and matte.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monkey's face, outstretched arms, and both legs clearly, with the cream-colored face and inner ears most visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding ear, and the arm and leg on this side, as well as the tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, the back of the body, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, right ear, and the right arm and leg, with the tail visible behind.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a simple, featureless mouth and no visible eyebrows, giving it a calm and gentle appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms and legs outstretched, and the head facing forward.
